message:
test: improve reparent test to exercise dotted-ID prefix matching

Rewrites the test to create a dotted-ID child (parentA.1) that triggers
prefix matching, then reparents it and verifies explicit deps take
precedence. Extracts helpers for cleaner test structure.

Co-authored-by: Joseph Turian <turian@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
